title: Admin 미구현 페이지 Wave Plan (2026-05-10)
summary: Phased wave plan to deliver four unimplemented admin pages (tag rules consolidation, voc-types, systems/menus, result-review) with scope, done-when, and risks per phase.
notes: Plan/wave document with goals, scoped phases, and acceptance criteria — closest to PRD (requirements + scope per phase). Contains some locked decisions table but overall Status is Draft and the doc is a multi-phase delivery plan, not a single ADR. SPEC signals (endpoint references) are citations to existing OpenAPI rather than new contract definitions.
